---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new template, checklist, example, or workflow improvement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested improvement.

## Use case

Who would use this, and during which workflow?

## Proposed addition

Describe the new template, checklist, doc section, example, or rule.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any existing file or workflow that partially covers this need.

## Safety considerations

Explain whether this feature involves create, update, delete, approve, reject, send, publish, release, or deploy operations.

If it does, include:

- Target
- Payload or operation details
- Impact scope
- Rollback plan

## Done criteria

List the conditions that would make this feature complete.
